topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: Principles of Accounting and Business Mathematics
topics.description: ACC 101, ACC 201 Financial Accounting, Business Law, and Quantitative Analysis.

subtopics.name: ACC 101: Introduction to Financial Accounting I & II
objectives: Understand accounting principles, double-entry bookkeeping, ledger accounts, and trial balance
Prepare trading, profit and loss accounts, and balance sheet (Statement of Financial Position)

subtopics.name: ACC 201: Intermediate Financial Accounting
objectives: Account for partnership creation, admission/retirement of partners, and partnership dissolution
Prepare manufacturing accounts, departmental accounts, branch accounts, and incomplete records

topics.name: 300 Level: Cost Accounting, Management Accounting, and Auditing
topics.description: ACC 301 Cost Accounting, Management Accounting, Auditing Principles, and Financial Reporting.

subtopics.name: ACC 301 & ACC 302: Cost and Management Accounting
objectives: Analyze material, labor, and overhead costing methods (job, batch, process costing)
Apply marginal costing, absorption costing, CVP analysis, and budgetary control systems

subtopics.name: ACC 303: Auditing Principles and Practice
objectives: Understand audit objectives, internal control systems, audit sampling, and ICAN/IFAC ethical standards
Conduct audit verification of assets/liabilities and draft independent auditor's report

topics.name: 400 Level: Advanced Accounting, Taxation, and B.Sc. Thesis
topics.description: ACC 401 Advanced Financial Accounting, Taxation, Corporate Finance, and Research Project.

subtopics.name: ACC 401 & ACC 402: Advanced Financial Reporting and Taxation
objectives: Prepare consolidated financial statements for parent-subsidiary group companies under IFRS
Calculate personal income tax, company income tax (CIT), petroleum profit tax, and VAT under FIRS rules

subtopics.name: ACC 499: Final Year Accounting Research Project
objectives: Write and defend original accounting research thesis adhering to ICAN and NUC academic standards
